name: Allstay
description: Allstays hotel/travel search APIs aggregating 2M+ Korean and global accommodations.

seo.title: Allstay — Search / Recommendations API
seo.meta_description: Allstay: Allstays hotel/travel search APIs aggregating 2M+ Korean and global accommodations.

when_to_use: Korean accommodation search for travel booking apps
Hotel pricing aggregation for comparison site
Property availability API for last-minute travel apps
Accommodation inventory feed for OTA integrations
2M+ hotel database for B2B travel API clients

pros: Deep Korean hotel inventory hard to find elsewhere
Aggregates 2M+ global accommodations in one API
Useful for travel apps targeting Asia-Pacific markets
cons: Sparse English documentation and developer resources
Commercial terms opaque without direct sales contact
Niche data scope outside Korea/APAC travel
SDK coverage thin compared to Booking or Expedia APIs
review.verdict: Valuable if you need Korean hotel data, but expect a sales-led onboarding rather than self-serve developer flow.
review.best_for: Travel products targeting Korea or APAC hotel aggregation use cases.
review.not_for: Global OTAs or devs wanting self-serve signup with clear English docs.

lock_in.reason: Travel search API with proprietary aggregated inventory

developer_experience.reason: REST API; Korean-first docs, niche vertical
